title: Dalek Mod: Additions
description: Addon mod for The Dalek Mod
body:
# Looking for some additional content for The Dalek Mod? Want some mechanics changed in it? Well, this mod is for you!

**Dalek Mod Additions** is an addon mod for [The Dalek Mod by SWDTeam]([https://swdteam.com/p/dalek-mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/dalek-mod)). It changes several of its features and adds plenty of its own.

> The Dalek Mod is required for this mod to function

### Current features include:

- Levers and panels are placeable on walls and ceilings. 
- Coral and copper flight levers
- Roundel containers
- TARDIS coordinate randomizer
- Plenty of daleks
- Integration with Tinkers Construct and New Tardis Mod.
- Bigger on the inside effect when using Immersive Portals Mod
- And much more! 

To suggest new features or report bugs, please contact jamesledolphin on Discord.
